name: Invoice Receipt
description: Sends a billing receipt email with invoice details.

body.en:
Payment Receipt

Hi {{.Subscriber.FirstName}},

We've received your payment. Here are the details:

Invoice#{{.Payload.invoiceNumber}}
Amount{{.Payload.currency}} {{.Payload.amount}}
Date{{.Payload.date}}
Plan{{.Payload.planName}}

View full invoice
body.fr:
Reçu de paiement

Bonjour {{.Subscriber.FirstName}},

Nous avons reçu votre paiement. Voici les détails :

Facture#{{.Payload.invoiceNumber}}
Montant{{.Payload.currency}} {{.Payload.amount}}
Date{{.Payload.date}}
Plan{{.Payload.planName}}

Voir la facture complète
body.pt:
Recibo de Pagamento

Olá {{.Subscriber.FirstName}},

Recebemos o seu pagamento. Aqui estão os detalhes:

Fatura#{{.Payload.invoiceNumber}}
Valor{{.Payload.currency}} {{.Payload.amount}}
Data{{.Payload.date}}
Plano{{.Payload.planName}}

Ver fatura completa
body.de:
Zahlungsbeleg

Hallo {{.Subscriber.FirstName}},

Wir haben Ihre Zahlung erhalten. Hier sind die Details:

Rechnung#{{.Payload.invoiceNumber}}
Betrag{{.Payload.currency}} {{.Payload.amount}}
Datum{{.Payload.date}}
Plan{{.Payload.planName}}

Vollständige Rechnung ansehen
body.it:
Ricevuta di Pagamento

Ciao {{.Subscriber.FirstName}},

Abbiamo ricevuto il tuo pagamento. Ecco i dettagli:

Fattura#{{.Payload.invoiceNumber}}
Importo{{.Payload.currency}} {{.Payload.amount}}
Data{{.Payload.date}}
Piano{{.Payload.planName}}

Vedi fattura completa
body.es:
Recibo de Pago

Hola {{.Subscriber.FirstName}},

Hemos recibido tu pago. Aquí están los detalles:

Factura#{{.Payload.invoiceNumber}}
Monto{{.Payload.currency}} {{.Payload.amount}}
Fecha{{.Payload.date}}
Plan{{.Payload.planName}}

Ver factura completa
